S.FORM: Nitakayama Makatukusay ko Taywan. O sa'akawangay a tukus ko Nitakayama.
S.PHON: nitakajama makato~u~uko~u~usaj ko~u tajwan. o~u saʡakawaŋaj a to~u~uko~u~us ko~u nitakajama.

S.PHON: nitakajama makato~u~uko~u~usaj ko~u tajwan. o~u saʡakawaŋaj a to~u~uko~u~us ko~u nitakajama.
